kw.name: Criar Sessao
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=serverest, url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Cria uma sessão para a API ServeRest utilizando a URL base definida nas variáveis:

test.name: CT-C01 Criar carrinho

kw.name: Criar Usuario E Obter Token
Gerar Email Aleatorio
Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Gera um email aleatório para uso nos testes de criação de usuários:

kw.name: Criar Usuario
Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '101', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "User", "email": "user_bBBWy@email.com", "password": "password123", "administrador": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Cria um usuário utilizando um nome, email, senha e status de administrador, retornando a resposta da requisição:

kw.name: Realizar Login
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/login path_url=/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '60', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "user_bBBWy@email.com", "password": "password123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Realiza o login na API ServeRest utilizando email e senha, retornando a resposta da requisição:

kw.name: Obter Token
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
Extrai o token de autenticação da resposta do login:
Cria um usuário, realiza login e retorna o token de autenticação:

kw.name: Criar Produto
Criar Header Com Token
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Cria um header de autenticação utilizando o token fornecido:

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/produtos path_url=/produtos headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJlbWFpbCI6InVzZXJfYkJCV3lAZW1haWwuY29tIiwicGFzc3dvcmQiOiJwYXNzd29yZDEyMyIsImlhdCI6MTc3NDU3MDA5MCwiZXhwIjoxNzc0NTcwNjkwfQ.OErt8kBwJ3kmNkWmoPltezJSKmf54AWO3JpcQSKgO5s', 'Content-Length': '83', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Produto 4xZYf", "preco": "100", "descricao": "Teste", "quantidade": "10"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
Cria um produto utilizando um token de autenticação e valida o status esperado:

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Criar Carrinho
Criar Header Com Token
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Cria um header de autenticação utilizando o token fornecido:

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/carrinhos path_url=/carrinhos headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJlbWFpbCI6InVzZXJfYkJCV3lAZW1haWwuY29tIiwicGFzc3dvcmQiOiJwYXNzd29yZDEyMyIsImlhdCI6MTc3NDU3MDA5MCwiZXhwIjoxNzc0NTcwNjkwfQ.OErt8kBwJ3kmNkWmoPltezJSKmf54AWO3JpcQSKgO5s', 'Content-Length': '68', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"produtos": [{"idProduto": "T71J1CDunD6oYZWa", "quantidade": "1"}]}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
Cria um carrinho de compras utilizando um token de autenticação e um ID de produto, validando o status esperado:

test.doc: Testa a criação de um carrinho com um produto válido, token e permissão:

test.name: CT-C02 Produto inválido

kw.name: DELETE On Session

kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
Conclui a compra do carrinho utilizando um token de autenticação, validando o status esperado:

test.doc: Testa a conclusão de uma compra com sucesso:
